discovery_keys.c(3) Library Functions Manual discovery_keys.c(3)

NAME

discovery_keys.c - Discovery Server Public Key Trust Management Implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_download_https (const char *url, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_file (const char *file_path, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_fetch_github (const char *username, bool is_gpg, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_fetch_gitlab (const char *username, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_get_cache_path (const char *acds_server, char *path_out, size_t path_size)
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_load_cached (const char *acds_server, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_save_cached (const char *acds_server, const uint8_t pubkey[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_clear_cache (const char *acds_server)
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify_change (const char *acds_server, const uint8_t old_pubkey[32], const uint8_t new_pubkey[32])
asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_verify (const char *acds_server, const char *key_spec, uint8_t pubkey_out[32])

Detailed Description

Discovery Server Public Key Trust Management Implementation.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file discovery_keys.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t discovery_keys_clear_cache (const char * acds_server)

Definition at line 236 of file discovery_keys.c.

236                                                                       {
237   if (!acds_server) {
238     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_clear_cache");
239   }
240 
241   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
242   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
243   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
244     return result;
245   }
246 
247   if (platform_is_regular_file(cache_path)) {
248     if (remove(cache_path) != 0) {
249       return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to delete cached key: %s", cache_path);
250     }
251     log_debug("Cleared cached ACDS key for server: %s", acds_server);
252   }
253 
254   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
255 }




References discovery_keys_get_cache_path(),
    platform_is_regular_file(), and PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH.






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_download_https (const char * url, uint8_t
  pubkey_out[32])


Definition at line 58 of file discovery_keys.c.


58                                                                                          {
59   if (!url || !pubkey_out) {
60     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_download_https");
61   }
62 
63   log_debug("Downloading ACDS key from %s", url);
64 
65   // Use existing parse_public_key infrastructure which handles HTTPS URLs
66   public_key_t key;
67   asciichat_error_t result = parse_public_key(url, &key);
68   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
69     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to download and parse ACDS key from %s", url);
70   }
71 
72   memcpy(pubkey_out, key.key, 32);
73   log_debug("Successfully downloaded and parsed ACDS key from %s", url);
74   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
75 }






References parse_public_key().






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_fetch_github (const char * username, bool is_gpg,
  uint8_t pubkey_out[32])


Definition at line 100 of file discovery_keys.c.


100                                                                                                          {
101   if (!username || !pubkey_out) {
102     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_fetch_github");
103   }
104 
105   log_debug("Fetching ACDS key from GitHub for user: %s", username);
106 
107   // Use existing parse_public_key infrastructure
108   char key_spec[BUFFER_SIZE_MEDIUM];
109   if (is_gpg) {
110     safe_snprintf(key_spec, sizeof(key_spec), "github:%s.gpg", username);
111   } else {
112     safe_snprintf(key_spec, sizeof(key_spec), "github:%s", username);
113   }
114 
115   public_key_t key;
116   asciichat_error_t result = parse_public_key(key_spec, &key);
117   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
118     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to fetch ACDS key from GitHub: %s", username);
119   }
120 
121   memcpy(pubkey_out, key.key, 32);
122   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
123 }






References parse_public_key(), and
  safe_snprintf().

asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_get_cache_path (const char * acds_server, char * path_out,
  size_t path_size)


Definition at line 150 of file discovery_keys.c.


150                                                                                                            {
151   if (!acds_server || !path_out || path_size == 0) {
152     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_get_cache_path");
153   }
154 
155   char *config_dir = get_config_dir();
156   if (!config_dir) {
157     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to get config directory");
158   }
159 
160   // Path: ~/.config/ascii-chat/acds_keys/<hostname>/key.pub
161   safe_snprintf(path_out, path_size, "%s" ACDS_KEYS_CACHE_DIR PATH_SEPARATOR_STR "%s" PATH_SEPARATOR_STR "key.pub",
162                 config_dir, acds_server);
163   SAFE_FREE(config_dir);
164 
165   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
166 }

  safe_snprintf().

  discovery_keys_load_cached (const char * acds_server, uint8_t
  pubkey_out[32])


Definition at line 168 of file discovery_keys.c.


168                                                                                               {
169   if (!acds_server || !pubkey_out) {
170     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_load_cached");
171   }
172 
173   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
174   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
175   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
176     return result;
177   }
178 
179   // Check if cached key exists
180   if (!platform_is_regular_file(cache_path)) {
181     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND, "No cached key for ACDS server: %s", acds_server);
182   }
183 
184   // Load cached key using existing infrastructure
185   return discovery_keys_load_file(cache_path, pubkey_out);

  discovery_keys_load_file (const char * file_path, uint8_t

Definition at line 77 of file discovery_keys.c.

79     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_load_file");
80   }
81

83 
84   // Use existing parse_public_key infrastructure which handles file paths
85   public_key_t key;
86   asciichat_error_t result = parse_public_key(file_path, &key);
87   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
88     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to load ACDS key from file: %s", file_path);
89   }
90

92   log_debug("Successfully loaded ACDS key from file: %s", file_path);

Referenced by discovery_keys_load_cached().






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_save_cached (const char * acds_server, const uint8_t
  pubkey[32])


Definition at line 188 of file discovery_keys.c.


188                                                                                                 {
189   if (!acds_server || !pubkey) {
190     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_save_cached");
191   }
192 
193   char cache_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
194   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_keys_get_cache_path(acds_server, cache_path, sizeof(cache_path));
195   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
196     return result;
197   }
198 
199   // Create cache directory if it doesn't exist
200   char dir_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
201   safe_snprintf(dir_path, sizeof(dir_path), "%s", cache_path);
202 
203   // Find the last path separator (handle both / and \ for cross-platform compatibility)
204   char *last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '\\');
205   if (!last_sep) {
206     last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '/');
207   }
208 
209   if (last_sep) {
210     *last_sep = '\0';
211     if (!platform_is_directory(dir_path)) {
212       asciichat_error_t result = platform_mkdir(dir_path, 0700);
213       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
214         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to create ACDS key cache directory: %s", dir_path);
215       }
216     }
217   }
218 
219   // Save key in OpenSSH public key format
220   FILE *f = platform_fopen("file_stream", cache_path, "w");
221   if (!f) {
222     return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_FILE_OPERATION, "Failed to create cache file: %s", cache_path);
223   }
224 
225   // Convert binary Ed25519 key to base64 for OpenSSH format
226   char base64_key[128];
227   sodium_bin2base64(base64_key, sizeof(base64_key), pubkey, 32, sodium_base64_VARIANT_ORIGINAL);
228 
229   fprintf(f, "ssh-ed25519 %s acds-cached-key\n", base64_key);
230   fclose(f);
231 
232   log_debug("Cached ACDS key for server: %s", acds_server);
233   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
234 }






References discovery_keys_get_cache_path(),
    platform_fopen(), PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH, and
    safe_snprintf().


Referenced by discovery_keys_verify().






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_verify (const char * acds_server, const char * key_spec,
  uint8_t pubkey_out[32])


Definition at line 303 of file discovery_keys.c.


303                                                                                                                {
304   if (!acds_server || !pubkey_out) {
305     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_verify");
306   }
307 
308   uint8_t new_pubkey[32];
309   asciichat_error_t result;
310   bool is_official = is_official_server(acds_server);
311 
312   // ===========================================================================
313   // Step 1: Obtain the public key
314   // ===========================================================================
315 
316   if (!key_spec && is_official) {
317     // Automatic trust for official server: try SSH key first, then GPG
318     log_info("Attempting automatic HTTPS key trust for official ACDS server");
319 
320     public_key_t key;
321     result = parse_public_key(ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_SSH_URL, &key);
322     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
323       log_debug("SSH key download failed, trying GPG key");
324       result = parse_public_key(ACDS_OFFICIAL_KEY_GPG_URL, &key);
325     }
326 
327     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
328       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to download key from official ACDS server");
329     }
330 
331     memcpy(new_pubkey, key.key, 32);
332 
333   } else if (!key_spec) {
334     // No key_spec and not official server = error
335     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
336                      "Third-party ACDS servers require explicit --discovery-service-key configuration."
337                      "Only %s has automatic trust.",
338                      ACDS_OFFICIAL_SERVER);
339 
340   } else {
341     // Use parse_public_key for all other cases (handles HTTPS, files, github:, gitlab:, etc.)
342     public_key_t key;
343     result = parse_public_key(key_spec, &key);
344     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
345       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_KEY, "Failed to load/download ACDS key from: %s", key_spec);
346     }
347 
348     memcpy(new_pubkey, key.key, 32);
349   }
350 
351   // ===========================================================================
352   // Step 2: Check cache and handle key changes
353   // ===========================================================================
354 
355   uint8_t cached_pubkey[32];
356   result = discovery_keys_load_cached(acds_server, cached_pubkey);
357 
358   if (result == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
359     // Cached key exists - compare
360     if (memcmp(cached_pubkey, new_pubkey, 32) != 0) {
361       // Key changed - require user verification
362       result = discovery_keys_verify_change(acds_server, cached_pubkey, new_pubkey);
363       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
364         return result; // User rejected or error
365       }
366 
367       // User accepted - update cache
368       result = discovery_keys_save_cached(acds_server, new_pubkey);
369       if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
370         log_warn("Failed to update cached key, continuing anyway");
371       }
372     } else {
373       log_debug("ACDS key matches cached key for: %s", acds_server);
374     }
375 
376   } else {
377     // No cached key - save it for next time
378     log_info("First connection to ACDS server: %s, caching key", acds_server);
379     result = discovery_keys_save_cached(acds_server, new_pubkey);
380     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
381       log_warn("Failed to cache key, continuing anyway");
382     }
383   }
384 
385   // ===========================================================================
386   // Step 3: Return verified key
387   // ===========================================================================
388 
389   memcpy(pubkey_out, new_pubkey, 32);
390   log_debug("ACDS key verification successful for: %s", acds_server);
391   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
392 }






References discovery_keys_load_cached(),
    discovery_keys_save_cached(), discovery_keys_verify_change(),
    and parse_public_key().


Referenced by client_crypto_init().






asciichat_error_t
  discovery_keys_verify_change (const char * acds_server, const uint8_t
  old_pubkey[32], const uint8_t new_pubkey[32])


Definition at line 261 of file discovery_keys.c.


262                                                                              {
263   if (!acds_server || !old_pubkey || !new_pubkey) {
264     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter in discovery_keys_verify_change");
265   }
266 
267   char old_fingerprint[65], new_fingerprint[65];
268   compute_key_fingerprint(old_pubkey, old_fingerprint);
269   compute_key_fingerprint(new_pubkey, new_fingerprint);
270 
271   log_warn("ACDS server key changed for: %s", acds_server);
272 
273   log_plain_stderr("\n"
274                    "⚠️  WARNING: ACDS SERVER KEY HAS CHANGED\n"
275                    "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
276                    "Server: %s\n"
277                    "\n"
278                    "Old key (SHA256): %s\n"
279                    "New key (SHA256): %s\n"
280                    "\n"
281                    "This could indicate:\n"
282                    "  1. The server operator rotated their key\n"
283                    "  2. A man-in-the-middle attack is in progress\n"
284                    "\n"
285                    "Verify the new key fingerprint with the server operator before accepting.\n"
286                    "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
287                    acds_server, old_fingerprint, new_fingerprint);
288 
289   // Ask user to confirm
290   bool accepted = platform_prompt_yes_no("Accept new ACDS server key", false);
291   if (!accepted) {
292     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, "User rejected ACDS key change for: %s", acds_server);
293   }
294 
295   log_info("User accepted ACDS key change for: %s", acds_server);
296   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
297 }






References compute_key_fingerprint(), and
    platform_prompt_yes_no().
